gist.headline: Daily Chronicles
gist.blurb: The hive's daily diary has been updated with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) acting as an archivist, updating a giant pixelated notice board with new polaroids of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning small pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden notice board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
